title: armeria alpina var. purpurea
intro: Armeria alpina var. purpurea, also known as Purple Mountain Thrift, is a perennial plant species in the Plumbaginaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to relieve urinary tract issues and reduce swelling. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and even exhibit antiseptic properties. Armeria alpina var. purpurea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
